itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

address.streetAddress: Madalayam Rd, Sreevatsa Global Village, Chinnavedampatti, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641049

itemListElement.reviewBody: My son has been studying since 1st std here, and everyone, including teachers, has helped us a lot at every stage of academics, especially navigating Tamil language since its not our native tongue either. I have been recommending this school for all parents who are aligned with the philosophy of letting children choose how they should study, empowering them to do things on their own and learning vital life skills. I love how the school focuses on children, being sensitive to needs and not pushing them into getting high grades or unhealthy competition. I have seen my child grow extremely positive and confident in the school and all credit to the teachers. I am glad I chose this school for my child!

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst experience with the school. Constant issues with the staff on not providing adequate teaching to kids. They expect kids to learn at home with external support outside of the school. Worst management.

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti
K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Reception staffs have to be more conscious while providing details regarding the kids admission. Upon visiting there for enquiry we were not given any details like timing, syllabus but with a straight forward answer we don't take this batch students now and so we don't have details to provide further.

Parent spending lot of time in exploring education for the kids, and the management has to value the time!

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti
K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: Ksirs utilizes their individual strengths to bring out the best in every child, while also creating an environment that promotes kindness, responsibility, and leadership. The administration is receptive to new ideas and thinks outside the box to ensure that Ksirs is a successful educational experience for the students.

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: Both my kids have been in Ksirs from pre-primary, and my daughter is completing her A levels this year. The freedom given to the children allows them to develop into self-reliant, independent thinkers. My son and daughter have different interests and throughout the years they have been provided with platforms where each of them was able to work on their own passions.

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: My daughter is studying here from grade 2. Ksirs team concentrates not only in academics. In the initial stage of learning they concentrate on life skills and other areas till they are in grade 5 which helps the kids to develop as confidence and skills. When the children are in higher grades a slow shift to academic importance happens where the children are not pressurised. Continuous revision exams and doubt clearing in grade 10 helped my daughter score good marks. Teachers are very very approachable by students for any doubts. Thanks to the ksirs team for the wonderful care and hardwork. Keep rocking 🎉.

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: I had studied here for 15 years. K'sirs not only teaches us academics but also makes us to discover ourselves. Proud to be a k'sirs alumni.

itemReviewed.name: K'sirs - Kaumaram Sushila International Residential School - Chinnavedampatti

itemListElement.reviewBody: Had a  worst experience. Front satff is very lethatgic. She doesn't like to respond us. Visted on 12.05.2023 2.15 PM.
